name: Role & Permission - Lihat Matrix, Toggle Permission, Simpan Perubahan
description: Test role permission matrix: lihat daftar permission per role, toggle akses permission, simpan perubahan. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click Role & Permission or Hak Akses menu in the sidebar
Role Permission page is visible showing a matrix of roles and permissions
Select a role (e.g., staff) from the role tabs or dropdown to view its permissions
Permission list for the selected role is shown with toggle switches or checkboxes
Toggle one permission checkbox or switch on or off
The permission toggle state changes visually
Click the Simpan or Save button to save the permission changes
Permission changes are saved and success notification appears
Switch to another role tab and verify its permissions are still intact
Other roles permissions are unchanged and displayed correctly
